name: sarahmirrand001-oss--intelligence-ingestion
description: Analyze and evaluate URLs, links, articles, tweets, and external info sources for strategic value. NOT a summarizer — this skill classifies, scores importance, maps to architecture, stores structured notes in Obsidian, updates the Strategic Landscape, and auto-generates draft Skills when new capabilities are detected (Auto-Skill Synthesis). Use when: user shares a link (x.com, github.com, arxiv.org, any URL), pastes article text, says "analyze this", "evaluate this", "what do you think about this", or forwards content. Do NOT use for: simple summarization requests (use summarize skill instead).
